rejectedObservations.observation: The mission's shared state still does not explain why `NativeBiometricVault` now has explicit `project.pbxproj` entries while `NativeSecureStorage` and `NativeCrypto` do not. Future iOS-native work can still get tripped up by this asymmetry unless the repo documents whether the older modules rely purely on codegen/Pods target membership or should also gain explicit pbxproj entries.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: the repo state shows the pbxproj asymmetry, but the underlying cause and the right permanent remediation are still unclear, while the current target-membership gotcha is already documented in .factory/library/native-biometric-vault-platform-gotchas.md
